16.name: Pattern: Harness of the High Thane

lines.left: Pattern: Harness of the High Thane
Use: Teaches you how to craft Harness of the High Thane.
Equip: Improves your chance to get a critical strike with spells by 1%.
Equip: Improves your chance to hit with spells by 1%.
Equip: Increases damage and healing done by magical spells and effects by up to 16.
Equip: Your spell critical strikes increase the damage of your next spell by up to 48.
Requires Cured Rugged Hide (6), Enchanted Leather (12), Breath of Wind (20), Essence of Air (8), Vibrant Plume (15), Thundering Charm (10), Rune Thread (4)
Use: Teaches you how to permanently enchant a bracer to give +5 Agility.
Use: Teaches you how to permanentl enchant boots to give +3 Intellect.
"Scorched by the fires and covered in ashes."
Use: Permanently increase the spell power value of an item worn on the chest, legs, hands or feet by 5. Only usable on items level 25 and above.
Use: Attaches a buckle to your belt that increases your Ranged Attack Power by 14.
Use: Attaches a buckle to your belt that increases your Fire Spell Damage by 9.
Use: Teaches you how to createan Dragonmaw Armor Kit.
Use: Permanently increase the spell power value of an item worn on the chest, legs, hands or feet by 5. Only usable on items level 25 and above.
Requires Red Whelp Scale (5), Fire Oil, Fine Thread (2)
Use: Teaches you how to create Steel Belt Buckle.
Use: Attaches a buckle to your belt that increases your Block Value by 10.
Requires Steel Bar (8), Iron Buckle, Solid Grinding Stone
Use: Teaches you how to create Gold Belt Buckle.
Use: Attaches a buckle to your belt that increases your Ranged Attack Power by 14.
Requires Gold Bar (8), Iron Buckle, Heavy Grinding Stone (2)
Use: Teaches you how to craft Dragonmaw Gloves.
Equip: Improves your chance to hit by 1%.
(2) Set: Improves your chance to hit by 1%.
(6) Set: Your successful melee attacks have a 5% chance to breathe flames at your enemy, dealing 45 to 55 Fire damage and an additional 15 Fire damage over 6 sec.
Requires Heavy Leather (14), Red Whelp Scale (4), Cured Heavy Hide (2), Large Fang (2), Small Flame Sac (2), Crystal Quartz (2)
Use: Teaches you how to sew Stormreaver Gloves.
Equip: Increases damage done by Shadow spells and effects by up to 14.
Equip: 1% of damage dealt is returned as healing.
(2) Set: Improves your chance to hit with spells by 1%.
(4) Set: Increases damage and healing done by magical spells and effects by up to 18.

(6) Set: Your landing damaging spells have a 5% chance to curse the enemy with Impending Doom, which arrives after 5 sec and deals 103 to 132 Shadow damage. Dealing Shadow damage to the target causes the Doom to arrive instantly and deal 20% more damage.
Requires Bolt of Silk Cloth (8), Shadow Oil (3), Elemental Fire (3), Citrine (3), Purple Dye, Silken Thread (2)
Use: Attaches a buckle to your belt that increases your Fire Resistance by 10.
Use: Teaches you how to make an Elixir of Rapid Growth.
Use: Increases Strength by 30 for 2 min. Once the effect expires, the user will become affected by Rapid Deterioration, reducing their strength and stamina by 25 for 2 min.
Requires Firebloom, Elemental Fire, Leaded Vial
Use: Attaches a buckle to your belt that increases your Arcane Resistance by 10.
Use: Attaches a buckle to your belt that increases your Strength by 10.
Use: Teaches you how to create Dark Iron Belt Buckle.
Use: Attaches a buckle to your belt that increases your Fire Resistance by 10.
Requires Dark Iron Bar (2), Iron Buckle, Essence of Fire, Dense Grinding Stone (2)
Equip: Increases damage done by Frost spells and effects by up to 7.
Use: Attaches a buckle to your belt that increases your Block Value by 10.

Use: Restores 151 mana over 18 sec.  Must remain seated while drinking.
Chance on hit: Increases Strength by 200 for 10 sec.
Use: Restores 243 health over 21 sec.  Must remain seated while eating.  If you spend at least 10 seconds eating you will become well fed and gain 4 Stamina and Spirit for 15 min.

Chance on hit: Hurls a fiery ball that causes 155 to 197 Fire damage and an additional 24 damage over 6 sec.
Chance on hit: Grants 1 extra attack on your next swing.
Equip: Your attacks ignore 20 of the target's armor.
Equip: Increases damage and healing done by magical spells and effects by up to 26.
